ddls:
CREATE TABLE "disease_outbreaks" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the outbreak */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the outbreak */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the outbreak */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the outbreak occurred */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group affected */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Number of reported cases */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease causing the outbreak */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms associated with the outbreak */,
  "transmission_methods" TEXT /* Methods of transmission for the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_outbreaks_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_outbreaks_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_outbreaks_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "incubation_period" INTEGER /* Incubation period of the disease */,
  "contagion_period" INTEGER /* Contagion period of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination effort */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease being vaccinated against */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the vaccination took place */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination */,
  "num_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals vaccinated */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine used */,
  "vaccine_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the hospital */,
  "num_beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the hospital */,
  "num_staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff in the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient being hospitalized */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the patient is being treated */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis for the patient */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment administered to the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, administrator, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "module_accessed" TEXT /* Module accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_outbreak_diseases" (
  "disease_outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease outbreak */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_outbreak_id", "disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_efforts" (
  "vaccination_effort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination effort */,
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination effort */,
  "num_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_effort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_efforts_vaccination_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_id") REFERENCES vaccinations ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_efforts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_efforts_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations_diseases" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospitalization */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id", "disease_id")
)
